FHA Streamline

FHA Streamline Refinance in Florida

The FHA Streamline Refinance is the simplest way for Florida homeowners with an existing FHA loan to lower their rate or payment. As the name suggests, it streamlines the process — typically with less documentation and, in many cases, no new appraisal.

Key benefits

Reduced paperwork, often no appraisal required, limited income/employment re-verification in many cases, and a faster path to a lower rate. It's built specifically to help existing FHA borrowers take advantage of better rates with minimal friction.

Eligibility basics

To qualify you generally need: an existing FHA loan, a solid recent payment history (on-time payments), enough time since your current loan closed, and a "net tangible benefit" — meaning the refinance must genuinely help you (such as a meaningful payment or rate reduction). The streamline does not allow cash-out beyond a small limit.

What it won't do

An FHA Streamline keeps mortgage insurance in place (it's still an FHA loan). To remove MIP entirely, you'd refinance into a conventional loan once you have enough equity. We can compare both paths.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is an FHA Streamline Refinance?+
A simplified refinance for homeowners who already have an FHA loan, designed to lower the rate or payment with reduced documentation and often no new appraisal.
Do I need an appraisal for an FHA Streamline?+
Often no — many FHA Streamline refinances skip the appraisal, which is one of the program's biggest advantages.
Who qualifies for an FHA Streamline Refinance?+
You generally need an existing FHA loan, a good recent payment history, enough seasoning since your current loan, and a net tangible benefit from refinancing.
Can I get cash out with an FHA Streamline?+
No — the Streamline doesn't allow meaningful cash-out. For that, you'd use an FHA cash-out refinance instead.
